global_summary: Company is behind pace with 22 of 151 tasks done. No project completed a single task since yesterday. Cashflow and material delays are stalling brick, framing and trim across the board.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only the fireplace-and-door fix landed this week; painting and final inspection still not started. Finish painting and pass final building inspection by Fri Jul 10 to save the week.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Project stalled all week with zero tasks done; brick purchase blocked by cashflow. Buy and install brick, and haul trash, by Sat Jul 11.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Two rooms painted, but tile install slipped a week to Thu Jul 17. Install kitchen electrical trim by Sun Jul 12.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug, but form board slipped to Mon Jul 13, delaying the concrete pour. Place the form board Mon Jul 13 to restart the foundation sequence.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No tasks done this week; carpet, tile, shutters and mantel all pushed to next week. Install fireplace mantel by Mon Jul 13 and carpet by Wed Jul 15.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Framing stalled; exterior sheathing, roof decking and doors/windows all pushed to Mon Jul 13. Complete roof decking and exterior sheathing by Mon Jul 13.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Three tasks done including interior paint, but electrical trim and glass both slipped to Mon Jul 13. Install mechanical trim by Sun Jul 12.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: 49.5% of planned work-days earned vs 61.6% expected — behind (6/20 tasks done). Key slip: FRAMING: EXECUTE (2026-07-04→2026-08-04, +31d).

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Plumbing fix done and project holding on pace, though drywall hang is now overdue. Hang sheetrock by Sun Jul 12.
